# flashduty_field (Data Source)

Retrieves a custom field from Flashduty.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get field by ID
data "flashduty_field" "priority" {
  id = "field-abc123"
}

# Use the field data
output "field_name" {
  value = data.flashduty_field.priority.field_name
}

output "field_display_name" {
  value = data.flashduty_field.priority.display_name
}

output "field_options" {
  value = data.flashduty_field.priority.options != null ? jsondecode(data.flashduty_field.priority.options) : []
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the field.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) The timestamp when the field was created.
- `default_value` (String) The default value as JSON.
- `description` (String) The description of the field.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the field.
- `field_name` (String) The name of the field.
- `field_type` (String) The type of the field.
- `options` (String) The available options as JSON array.
- `status` (String) The status of the field.
- `updated_at` (Number) The timestamp when the field was last updated.
- `value_type` (String) The value type of the field.
